user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable the timesheet module, so that I control whether timesheet functionality is available in the organization
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable timesheet module?"; Then the choice is captured for the timesheet module

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my timesheet module configuration, so that my selection is persisted
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen a timesheet module option; When I click Save; Then the setting is stored

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and proceed to the next configuration step, so that I can continue the setup flow efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen a timesheet module option; When I click Save & Next; Then the setting is saved and I advance to the next step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel the setup without saving, so that I can discard unwanted changes
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then no changes are persisted
